name: Customer
description: The Stripe Customer object representing a business's end customer with stored payment information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the customer (prefix: cus_)

name.description: Customer's full name or business name

description.description: Arbitrary string description of the customer

balance.description: Current balance in the customer's currency, applied to next invoice

currency.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code of customer's balance

delinquent.description: Whether the customer is in delinquency on invoices

default_source.description: ID of the default payment source for the customer

invoice_settings.description: Default invoice settings for this customer

default_payment_method.description: ID of the default payment method for invoices

subscriptions.description: List of subscriptions belonging to the customer

tax_ids.description: Tax IDs associated with the customer

created.description: Unix timestamp when the customer was created

livemode.description: Whether the customer exists in live mode
